en.name: Level 33 — The Infinite Mall
en.shortDescription: An infinite shopping mall that decays the further you travel, from clean stores into flooded, hazardous ruins.
en.atmosphere: Clean and quiet at first, turning flooded, moldy and overgrown as mental deterioration and hallucinations creep in.
en.tips: Try not to travel beyond ~50 miles. Stay hydrated, manage the psychological effects and watch for entity activity that grows with distance.
